rulings.Case Title: DAWN M THOMPSON VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 17, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANTS BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY, BANKERS INSURANCE GROUP, BANKERS FINANCIAL CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. THE MOTION IS NOT MOOT IN THAT IT ADDRESSES THE OPERATIVE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF'S ESTOPPEL/WAIVER ALLEGATION UNDER THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION HAS NO MERIT. ADVANCED NETWORK INC. V. PEERLESS INS. CO. (2010) 190 CAL.APP.4TH 1054, 1059. THE UNDISPUTED EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT THE ACCIDENT AROSE FROM USE OF THE CAR. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE IS DENIED AS IT DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 437c(h). =(302/LMG)

DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT SURROUNDING CAUSATION THROUGH CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE PROFERRED BY PERCIPIENT WITNESS AND PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT WITNESS PHETTEPLACE. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: PORFERIO EBORLAS VS. INDYMAC BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, February 17, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANTS ONEWEST BANK, FSB, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part. As to the 1st cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to defendants MER, OWB and FSB. Plaintiff has not pled a cause of action against any Def.s except Baycal and IMB in that all of the alleged fraud took place during origination of the loan which did not involve moving defendants. As to the 2nd cause of action the motion is sustained without leave to amend for the reasons outlined above. As to the 3rd cause of action the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to defendants MER, OWB and FSB. As to the 5th cause of action the demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled facts showing a contractual relationship and a breach of the covenant of good faith by the defendants. As to the 6th cause, the demurrer is sustained with Leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead the formation and operation of the conspiracy as to the moving defendants and the specific wrongful acts done pursuant to the alleged conspiracy as to these defendants, independent of the alleged fraud in the origination of the loan by the other defendants. As to the 7th cause of action, the demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff has not sufficiently distinguished the conduct of each defendant under BP §17200. As to the 8th cause of action, the plaintiff has sufficiently plea facts to show that a benefit was conferred on each defendant. As to the 9th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to defendant MERS. It is overruled as to the other defendants and on other grounds. Plaintiff has failed to plead any adverse claim asserted by MERS who has transferred titled as beneficiary to defendant OWB. As to the issue of tender, plaintiff has alleged facts that would render the Deed of Trust void. Theref
